name: Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>影</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>えい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>霊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>い－セフィラウェンディ
desc:
[ Pendulum Effect ] 
You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Ritual Beast" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.

[ Monster Effect ] 
When this card is Normal or Pendulum Summoned: You can add 1 face-up "Zefra" monster from your Extra Deck to your hand, except "Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi". You can only Special Summon "Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi(s)" once per turn.
pend_eff: You cannot Pendulum Summon monsters, except "Ritual Beast" and "Zefra" monsters. This effect cannot be negated.
mnst_eff: When this card is Normal or Pendulum Summoned: You can add 1 face-up "Zefra" monster from your Extra Deck to your hand, except "Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi". You can only Special Summon "Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi(s)" once per turn.
eff: When this card is Normal or Pendulum Summoned: You can add 1 face-up "Zefra" monster from your Extra Deck to your hand, except "Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi". You can only Special Summon "Ritual Beast Tamer Zefrawendi(s)" once per turn.

action: Adds from Extra Deck to hand
summoning: Restricts the player's Pendulum Summons to archetype specific monsters
